question.text: Position limits for equity index derivatives are monitored intraday by exchanges through minimum how many random snapshots?

answer.text: Four random snapshots during the trading day
Two random snapshots during the trading day
Six random snapshots during the trading day

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Intraday limits shall be monitored by Stock Exchanges through a minimum of four random snapshots during the trading day. **The Trap:** While SPAN margins are computed in real-time, position limits use snapshot-based monitoring. **Cross-Exam Context:** Intraday monitoring of position limits was introduced to detect outsized positions on expiry days. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Random snapshots are designed to prevent gaming - participants cannot predict when their positions will be checked.
